daily_summary.headline: Exciting Launch Day and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 6-108
top_events.description: A batch of 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for real-time updates.

top_events.title: HASTE | That's Not A Knife (DART AE)
top_events.description: Payload is a scramjet-powered hypersonic vehicle developed by Australian company Hypersonix.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for real-time updates.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Possible aurora at high latitudes with Kp 4.33, best for northern locations (65°+).
top_events.action: Check sky conditions if you're in a high latitude area.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
